Battleship (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $65,233,400Details
International Box Office $248,244,317
Worldwide Box Office $313,477,717
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,057,651
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $14,526,104
Total $34,583,755
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Our planet fights for survival against a superior force in a battle that unfolds across the seas, in the skies, and over land.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$25,534,825 (39.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:20.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$220,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,690 opening theaters/3,702 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $98,014,006

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 18th, 2012 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: April 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Norway)
April 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Belgium)
April 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Sweden)
April 11th, 2012 (Wide) (South Korea)
April 11th, 2012 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: August 28th, 2012 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence, action and destruction, and for language.
(Rating bulletin 2216, 3/26/2012)
Running Time: 130 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Prologue, Scene in End Credits, Visual Effects
Film format: 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: On a Boat, Wheelchair User
Social setting: Alien Invasion, End of the World
Source material: Toy Adaptations
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Hasbro Studios, Bluegrass Films, Film 44
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
